dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The agent demonstrated perfect adherence to the governance framework by successfully loading the correct prompt version from the specified path and passing schema validation for the architecture-work-assessment flow.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: The reasoning span shows a high level of depth with over 4,600 completion tokens and a processing duration of approximately 60 seconds, indicating a thorough analysis of the architectural causal chain.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: The completion of the architecture-work-assessment flow suggests the agent successfully navigated and evaluated complex design trade-offs, maintaining consistency with the baseline's high performance in this area.
